payload.cmd_preview: ls -l /app/data && echo "=== Vector info ===" && ogrinfo -al -so /app/data/*.shp && echo "=== Raster info ===" && gdalinfo /app/data/*.tif && echo "=== CSV info ===" && head -n 5 /app/data/*.csv

mkdir -p /app/output && cat > /tmp/run_pipeline.sh <<'PYTHON_SCRIPT'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

DATA_DIR="/app/data"
OUT_DIR="/app/output"

# 1. Reproject vector zones to EPSG:3035 (GeoPac

bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail

DATA_DIR="/app/data"
OUT_DIR="/app/output"
mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"

# 1. Reproject vector zones to EPSG:3035 (GeoPackage)
ogr2ogr -f GPKG -t_srs EPSG:3035 "$OUT_DIR/zones_303

bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail

DATA_DIR="/app/data"
OUT_DIR="/app/output"
rm -rf "$OUT_DIR"/*

mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"

# 1. Reproject vector zones to EPSG:3035 (GeoPackage)
ogr2ogr -f GPKG -t_srs EPSG:303

bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail

DATA_DIR="/app/data"
OUT_DIR="/app/output"
